data.title: Hospitality at Work® takes over management of 400,000 sq ft office complex in downtown LA Financial District.
data.description: Hospitality at Work, a prominent property management firm and Lowe subsidiary, has taken over the management of two significant office buildings in downtown Los Angeles Financial District. The buildings encompass over 400,000 square feet of prime commercial space. These properties are the Biltmore Tower, a 25-story high-rise located at 500 South Grand Avenue, and Biltmore Court, an adjacent 11-story building at 520 South Grand Avenue. Both structures boast ample natural light and offer a range of modern amenities for tenants.

data.title: Bridgeport now has access to 24-hour purified ice and drinking water with low cost, thanks to Ice House America.
data.description: A new site in Bridgeport, Connecticut, launched by local business owner Nick Mirabile, is now offering round-the-clock availability of purified ice and drinking water at a reduced cost. The introduction of Ice House America to the area on Jan. 28, 2026, is aimed at providing the community with a convenient and affordable option for these essentials. This initiative marks a significant advancement in ensuring the accessibility of essential supplies, catering to the needs of the local residents.

data.title: Philip Eklem promoted to Partner at RJLF, effective Jan 1, 2026. Specializes in patent litigation in U.S. district courts.
data.description: In Washington on January 28, 2026, Reichman Jorgensen Lehman & Feldberg LLP (RJLF) shared that Philip Eklem has been elevated to Partner starting January 1, 2026. Eklem's expertise lies in handling patent litigation cases in U.S. district courts and the U.S. International Trade Commission. This promotion highlights his contributions and commitment to the field.

data.title: BTC surged past $90,000 alongside gold gains, weaker USD. FOMC meeting today - cut or hold rates? Altcoins also on rise.
data.description: The value of Bitcoin surged to over $90,000 amidst a drop in the US dollar index and a record high for gold. Traders are preparing for today's FOMC meeting, speculating whether a rate cut or hold will further boost the rally in BTC and alternative cryptocurrencies.

data.title: Inventor creates noninvasive ventilation device for CPR, F.R.O.G. (ADA-2054), aiming to provide safe air delivery.
data.description: A creator from Hiawassee, Georgia stated that they developed THE F. R. O. G. (FIRST RESPONDERS OXYGEN GENERATOR) as a safe alternative to provide air to individuals during CPR without mouth-to-mouth contact. The invention, unveiled on Jan. 28, 2026, in Pittsburgh, aims to improve emergency response by offering oxygen to those in need.

data.title: Dubai Insurance introduces crypto wallet for premium payments and claims settlement in partnership with Zodia Custody.
data.description: A collaboration with Zodia Custody will enable insurance premiums and claims to be processed using cryptocurrency through a secure digital wallet system.

data.title: Innovation Beverage Group Ltd (Nasdaq: IBG) will effect a 5-for-1 reverse stock split of its ordinary shares.
data.description: In Seven Hills, Australia, on January 28, 2026, Innovation Beverage Group Ltd (Nasdaq: IBG), a company known for its development, production, and promotion of a diverse beverage range consisting of 60 formulations under 13 alcoholic and non-alcoholic brands, disclosed plans for a significant change. The company, referred to as IBG, announced its intention to implement a five-for-one (5-for-1) reverse stock split of its ordinary shares.

data.title: Wadhwani Foundation aims to create 2.5 million jobs and enable 6 million placements globally by 2030, focusing on Mexico City.
data.description: In Mexico City, the Wadhwani Foundation, a worldwide non-profit organization dedicated to generating employment opportunities, is enhancing its operational approach within Mexico.

data.title: Cryptocurrency market trends report predicts market to reach $11.07 billion by 2035 with CAGR of 11.54% - ResearchAndMarkets.
data.description: A report on the cryptocurrency market has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market is currently worth USD 3.33 billion and is estimated to reach USD 11.07 billion by 2035. It is expected to grow at a CAGR of 11.54% during this period. The report covers various aspects such as the distribution by type of technology, area of application, type of custody solution, type of cryptocurrency, type of component, type of experience level, and geographical regions.
